rule_name: Impossible travel: simultaneous logins from geographically separated locations
description: User m.takahashi logged in from Tokyo, JP at 02:14 UTC. Prior session within last 24h was from Dubai, AE at 14:32 UTC the previous day. Geographic distance ~7,900 km cannot be traversed in elapsed time. MFA challenge passed on both sessions.
